regulations.title: Pressure Vessel Statutory Inspection
regulations.description: All pressure vessels shall undergo statutory inspection by a competent person at intervals not exceeding 24 months. Inspection shall include internal visual examination, thickness measurement by UT, and hydrostatic/pneumatic testing as applicable.
regulations.legal_consequence: Plant shutdown order by PESO authority. Section 31 of Factories Act 1948.
regulations.corrective_action: Schedule statutory inspection with CCOE-approved competent person immediately.

regulations.title: Pressure Vessel External Inspection
regulations.description: External inspection of pressure vessels including visual check, corrosion assessment, insulation condition, and support integrity — annually.
regulations.legal_consequence: Warning notice. Repeat violation leads to shutdown.
regulations.corrective_action: Arrange external inspection by certified inspector. Document findings in equipment register.

regulations.title: Safety Relief Valve Inspection and Testing
regulations.description: All safety relief valves on pressure systems shall be tested for set pressure and leakage at intervals not exceeding 12 months. Valves shall be removed, bench-tested, and recertified.
regulations.legal_consequence: Critical safety violation. Immediate plant shutdown by factory inspector.
regulations.corrective_action: Remove SRV immediately for bench testing. Install tested spare. Do not operate unprotected system.

regulations.title: Fired Heater Inspection
regulations.description: Fired heaters shall undergo comprehensive inspection covering firebox, tubes, refractory, burners, and safety interlock systems at intervals not exceeding 24 months.
regulations.legal_consequence: Shutdown order. Potential criminal liability under Factories Act Section 92.
regulations.corrective_action: Schedule turnaround inspection. Engage certified tube thickness inspection agency.

regulations.title: Fired Heater Burner and Safety System Check
regulations.description: Burner management systems, flame scanners, and fuel shut-off valves on fired heaters must be function-tested every 6 months.
regulations.legal_consequence: Immediate shutdown. Section 7A OISD compliance requirement.
regulations.corrective_action: Conduct functional test of BMS. Replace faulty components. Document test certificates.

regulations.title: Boiler Statutory Certificate of Fitness
regulations.description: No boiler shall be used unless it is in possession of a valid certificate of fitness granted by a competent authority. Certificate must be renewed annually.
regulations.legal_consequence: Use of boiler without valid certificate is a cognisable offence under Section 92. Imprisonment up to 2 years or fine up to Rs 2 lakh.
regulations.corrective_action: Obtain certificate of fitness from Boiler Inspectorate before resuming operation.

regulations.title: Lifting Machinery Annual Examination
regulations.description: All lifting machines, chains, ropes, and lifting tackle used in the factory shall be examined by a competent person at least once in every period of 12 months.
regulations.legal_consequence: Penalty under Section 92. Plant safety notice.
regulations.corrective_action: Arrange examination by competent person. Certify and tag all lifting equipment.

regulations.title: Static and Mobile Pressure Vessel Rules — Periodic Testing
regulations.description: All static pressure vessels under SMPV Rules 1981 shall undergo hydrostatic testing at 1.5x design pressure at intervals specified by the competent authority, generally every 5 years.
regulations.legal_consequence: Revocation of licence to store petroleum/gas. Section 8 Petroleum Act 1934.
regulations.corrective_action: Schedule hydrostatic test with PESO-approved testing agency. Obtain test certificate.

regulations.title: Centrifugal Pump Predictive Maintenance Monitoring
regulations.description: Critical centrifugal pumps shall have vibration and bearing temperature monitoring at intervals not exceeding 3 months. Pumps classified as critical must have baseline data established.
regulations.legal_consequence: Audit finding. Potential production loss liability.
regulations.corrective_action: Establish vibration baseline. Set up regular monitoring schedule. Install permanent monitoring if justified.

regulations.title: Reciprocating Compressor Inspection
regulations.description: Reciprocating compressors shall be opened for internal inspection of cylinders, valves, piston rings, and packing at intervals not exceeding 12 months.
regulations.corrective_action: Schedule compressor overhaul. Replace worn valves, rings, and packing.

regulations.title: Control Valve Functional Test
regulations.description: Safety-critical control valves shall undergo stroke testing and calibration check every 6 months. Valves on emergency shutdown duty must be proof-tested annually.
regulations.corrective_action: Conduct stroke test. Check calibration. Replace actuator/positioner if required.

regulations.title: Heat Exchanger Inspection
regulations.description: Heat exchangers shall be inspected for fouling, tube thickness, and bundle condition at intervals not exceeding 24 months. Tube thickness measurement by UT/ET as applicable.
regulations.legal_consequence: Audit finding. Potential tube failure leading to product contamination or fire.
regulations.corrective_action: Pull bundle. Conduct tube thickness survey. Plug or replace failed tubes. Document in inspection register.

regulations.title: Storage Tank API 653 Inspection
regulations.description: Atmospheric storage tanks for petroleum products shall be inspected per API 653 standard. Full inspection at intervals determined by corrosion rates, but not exceeding 10 years. External inspection every 5 years.
regulations.legal_consequence: PESO licence condition. Failure may result in licence cancellation.
regulations.corrective_action: Schedule tank inspection per API 653. Engage certified tank inspection contractor.

regulations.title: Electric Motor Insulation Resistance Test
regulations.description: All electric motors driving critical equipment shall have insulation resistance (IR) test conducted at intervals not exceeding 12 months. Motors in humid or corrosive environments — 6 months.
regulations.corrective_action: Conduct IR test with insulation tester (Megger). Rewind motor if IR below 1 MΩ/kV.

regulations.title: Flow Meter and Instrument Calibration
regulations.description: All process instruments used for custody transfer or safety shall be calibrated at intervals not exceeding 12 months. Instruments on safety systems — 6 months.
regulations.corrective_action: Calibrate against certified reference standard. Issue calibration certificate. Update tag.
